name: Cold Curried Carrot and Coconut Milk Soup with Crisp Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons finely grated peeled fresh gingerroot
3/4 pound carrots, peeled and sliced thinly (about 2 cups)
1/2 cup canned unsweetened coconut milk (up to 3/4)
2 teaspoons fresh lime juice plus additional to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan, cook chopped scallion, onion, and gingerroot in butter with curry powder and salt and pepper to taste over moderately low heat until softened.
2. Add carrots and hot chicken broth. Simmer the mixture, covered, for 15 minutes or until the carrots are very soft.
3. In a blender, puree the mixture in batches with coconut milk until very smooth. Transfer the purée back to a bowl.
4. Stir in 1 tablespoon lime juice and chill the soup for at least 6 hours or overnight.
5. Thin the soup with ice water as needed and season with additional lime juice, salt, and pepper.
6. Garnish with scallions and crisp shrimp before serving.
